topOfMind.summary: Actively engaged in regular LeetCode daily practice with verified account (username: aaanan-ren-pi-fa-shang-wang-jie-gong-bu-ying-qiu). On April 19, 2026, completed 10 unique problems with 18 total submissions, exceeding typical daily targets with difficulty distribution of 1 Easy, 8 Medium, and 1 Hard. Successfully solved Daily Challenge #1855 Maximum Distance Between a Pair of Values after 4 attempts. Systematically generates comprehensive markdown summaries documenting problem lists, complexity analysis, key techniques practiced (Two Pointers, Hash Tables, Prefix Sum, BFS, Binary Search, Monotonic Stack), and learning takeaways. Files saved locally at /mnt/user-data/outputs/ directory for tracking progress. Continues maintaining strong technical focus with emphasis on medium-difficulty algorithmic problems while demonstrating proficiency across diverse topics including array manipulation, graph traversal, and dynamic programming.

recentMonths.summary: Consistent LeetCode daily practice routine established since early April 2026, with focus on algorithmic problem-solving at medium difficulty level. Successfully retrieved actual LeetCode account data showing extensive problem-solving activity. On April 15, 2026, user completed 6 problems covering diverse topics including Dynamic Programming, DFS/Tree traversal, Topological Sort, Backtracking, and Greedy algorithms. On April 16, 2026, user tackled Binary Tree Maximum Path Sum (HARD). On April 17, 2026, user completed Word Break and Minimum Absolute Distance Between Mirror Pairs (MEDIUM). On April 19, 2026, user completed 10 unique problems with 18 total submissions including Multi Source Flood Fill, Smallest Stable Index I/II, Maximum Distance Between a Pair of Values (Daily Challenge #1855), Subarray Sum Equals K, Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters, Mirror Distance of an Integer, Trapping Rain Water, 3Sum, Container With Most Water, and Move Zeroes. Systematic tracking revealed topic area scores across multiple skill categories. Recently expanded to generating comprehensive daily markdown summaries with problem analysis, complexity details, and planning components. When GitHub commit authentication failed, user accepted fallback to local outputs directory storage.
